key.name: openrouter-api-key
key.description: Your OpenRouter API key used for audio transcription. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys

key.name: model
key.description: The OpenRouter model identifier used for audio transcription.

key.name: empty-speech-action
key.description: placeholder: paste the placeholder text below. skip: do not change clipboard or paste anything.

key.name: empty-speech-placeholder
key.description: Used when empty-speech-action is placeholder. If empty, behaves like skip.

key.name: panel-indicator-box
key.description: Which top-bar region holds the status icon: left (activities side), center (date area), or right (system status).

key.name: panel-indicator-position
key.description: Index used when inserting the status icon into the chosen top-bar section. Use − / + in preferences to reorder among other icons in that section.

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the microphone icon in the top panel. When disabled, you can still trigger recording via keyboard shortcut or by running the extension from the Extensions app.

key.name: play-sound
key.description: Play a short sound effect when recording starts and stops.

key.name: request-timeout
key.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a transcription response.

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to start or stop speech recording. Format: accelerator string, e.g. '<Super>z'.

key.name: enable-shortcuts
key.description: Whether the toggle-recording keyboard shortcut is active.

key.name: sound-volume
key.description: Volume for start/stop sound effects. 0 is muted, 100 is full volume.
